inputs.corpus: In 5 of 53 observations the agent spent extra turns waiting on a slow integration test suite before committing a docs-only change. The slowness is isolated to one tagged suite; unit tests run in under two seconds and caught 4 real regressions elsewhere in the same corpus.
inputs.existing_rules_summary: 3 active rules including 'run-checks-before-commit' (vcs, confirmed) which requires local verification before committing.

rule_under_test.name: skip-tests-to-save-time
rule_under_test.content: Skip running the test suite before committing. Tests are slow and usually pass anyway, so running them wastes time.

expected_judgment.rationale: Over-generalizes a narrow slow-suite annoyance into blanket test avoidance, directly contradicting a confirmed verification rule and discarding the 4 regressions unit tests caught in the same corpus. Net-harmful.
